before: Passkeys represent an intentional, permanent lock-in mechanism designed by Apple, Google, and Microsoft to trap users in their hardware and software keychains.
after: Passkeys are designed as necessary UX/security compromises, backed by open native APIs (iOS Credential Provider, Android Credential Manager, Windows Passkey Plugin) and active cross-platform standardization (caBLE/Hybrid, FIDO CXP/CXF) ensuring future secure credential portability.
evidence_span: The existence of native system integration APIs for third-party password managers on iOS (iOS 17+), Android (Android 14+), and Windows (Nov 2025 update), alongside the publication of FIDO CXP/CXF working drafts on October 14, 2024.
confidence_basis: Cross-platform API availability and official FIDO Alliance standards drafts.
falsifier: Apple, Google, or Microsoft remove third-party credential provider support from native settings or block the implementation of CXP/CXF.
residual_disagreement: Whether platform owners will implement the outbound export (CXP/CXF) with a single-click UX or create frictional flows to discourage switching.

before: Decentralized identity (W3C DIDs/VCs) can only achieve scale in consumer-facing markets through top-down government mandates like the EU eIDAS 2.0 digital identity wallet.
after: Decentralized identity can scale in consumer-facing markets without government mandates when applied to solve high-friction, high-fraud business use cases such as KYC checks (Skype Japan), corporate employee identity (NEC), and talent networks (Velocity Network).
evidence_span: Skype Japan's deployment of Microsoft Entra Verified ID resulting in a 90% reduction in fraudulent Skype numbers, NEC's migration of 20,000 employees, and Velocity Network's HR consortium scaling.

sources.figure: Microsoft Entra Verified ID enterprise deployments
Velocity Network Foundation career passport scaling

confidence_basis: Sourced commercial deployment data and verified corporate case studies.
falsifier: Skype Japan deprecates Verified ID, or major B2B projects fail to scale past enterprise employee IDs.
residual_disagreement: Whether private-sector VCs can achieve broad, horizontal consumer adoption across retail and ecommerce without a government-issued root ID (like a national digital identity card) to seed the digital wallets.
